const features = [ { icon: (), title: 'Lightning Fast', desc: 'Get a full fashion product description in under 5 seconds after uploading your outfit photo.' }, { icon: (), title: 'Fashion-Trained Model', desc: 'Fine-tuned on thousands of real fashion product listings for precise, on-brand, retail-ready copy.' }, { icon: (), title: 'Dead-Simple Interface', desc: 'No technical skills needed. Upload your garment photo, click generate, and copy your description.' }, { icon: (), title: 'Premium Quality Copy', desc: 'Persuasive, elegant descriptions that highlight fabrics, fit, and style — boosting your conversion rate.' }, { icon: (), title: 'All Fashion Categories', desc: 'Dresses, knitwear, sneakers, outerwear, accessories — our model adapts to virtually every clothing category.' }, { icon: (), title: 'Secure Cloud Processing', desc: 'No local installation required. Everything runs on our secure cloud — your images are never stored.' }, ]; const Features = () => (

Why DescriptoAI?

Everything you need to automate your fashion product content at scale.

{features.map((f, i) => (
{f.icon}

{f.title}

{f.desc}

))}
); export default Features;
